ui_action.name: Create Payment Request
ui_action.description: Initiates payment process for incident fee

ui_action.name: Approve Replacement
ui_action.description: Marks item as approved for replacement

ui_action.name: Send for Review
ui_action.description: Escalates incident to library manager for review

ui_action.name: Close Dispute
ui_action.description: Closes the dispute with final notes

ui_action.name: Get AI Assessment
ui_action.description: Requests Copilot AI to assess the dispute

ui_action.name: Reject Dispute
ui_action.description: Rejects the dispute claim with explanation
